title: Revamp self-service onboarding flow for new users
description: Redesign the new-user onboarding wizard with self-service setup steps, guided tours, and a getting-started checklist. Goal is to reduce time-to-first-value for new users onboarding to the product.

title: Update client-side token storage for new 24hr expiry
description: Phoenix (PHX-103) is reducing token TTL from 72h to 24h for compliance. Horizon currently stores tokens in localStorage and silently fails on expiry. Need to add refresh logic.

title: Migrate notification feed to real-time pipeline
description: Atlas (ATL-202) is shipping real-time pipeline v2. Horizon's notification feed needs to switch from polling to event subscription. Data shape is changing.

title: Update API gateway routes for Atlas v2 migration
description: All Horizon API calls go through the Atlas gateway. When ATL-201 ships, all route paths change. No joint migration plan exists yet.

title: Migrate local Button component back to Nova design system
description: Horizon built a local Button override 3 months ago. Now Nova is shipping v3 tokens. Need to delete local override and use Nova's Button before v3 ships.
